description:
Antagonistic quality review of `hx-carousel` (T4-07) **after implementation completes**.

Review every file in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-carousel/` critically.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, loop prop typed, autoplay/interval typed, items-per-view typed, navigation typed
2. Accessibility — `role="region"` with accessible name, prev/next buttons have accessible labels, pagination dots have accessible labels ("Slide 1 of 5"), auto-play MUST have pause control (WCAG 2.2.2), keyboard: arrow keys navigate, autoplay pauses on focus/hover, axe-core pass
3. Tests — navigation, loop behavior, autoplay pause on focus, keyboard nav, 80%+ coverage
4. Storybook — basic, autoplay, multi-item, with pagination
5. CSS — `--hx-*` tokens, smooth scroll animation, `prefers-reduced-motion` stops animation, CSS parts (carousel, slide, prev-btn, next-btn, pagination)
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB, no external carousel lib dependency
7. Drupal — Twig-renderable

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-carousel/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-carousel — T4-07 antagonistic quality review
